betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Market§f

§aBuy seeds, saplings, and animal spawn eggs using emeralds.§f

The §bMarket§f is your source for otherwise hard-to-obtain seeds and supplies. Temperate, coniferous, and tropical fruit tree saplings are available alongside crop seeds, animal spawn eggs (pig, sheep, cow, chicken, horse, llama, ocelot, wolf, rabbit), leads, nametags, bone meal, and queen bees.

§6Crafting§f:
§eShaped recipe:§f
§b• 4× Wood Planks§f (corners)
§b• 4× Wool§f (sides)
§b• 1× Emerald§f (center)

§6Market Inventory§f:
The Market stocks the following categories:
§b• Fruit Tree Saplings§f: Almond, Apple, Apricot, Avocado, Banana, Cherry, Coconut, Lemon, Mango, Orange, Papaya, Peach, Plum, and more.
§b• Crop Seeds§f: Asparagus, Bean, Beet, Bellpepper, Broccoli, Cabbage, Carrot, Celery, Corn, Cotton, Cucumber, Eggplant, and many others.
§b• Animal Spawn Eggs§f: Pig, Sheep, Cow, Chicken, Horse, Llama, Ocelot, Wolf, Rabbit.
§b• Utility Items§f: Leads, Name Tags, Bone Meal, Queen Bees.

§6Usage§f:
§9Right-click§f the Market to open its GUI. Browse available items and purchase with emeralds. The Market is a wooden block (Material.WOOD, hardness §e1.0§f) that opens a TileEntity-based shop interface (TileEntityMarket).

§eTip§f: Build a §bShipping Bin§f to sell crops for emeralds, then reinvest those emeralds in the Market for seeds and saplings you cannot find naturally.
